## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content production, SEO strategies, and new AI-driven visibility tools.](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 6 refreshes, 2 new articles, 2 pending refreshes, 7 articles from last week pending](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Shift in SEO focus: From click-based to visibility-based metrics due to AI-driven search results](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [New tool adoption: Profound for AI visibility tracking, showing promise in sentiment analysis and multi-platform visibility](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Topics
